ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field */,
  "season_start" INTEGER /* Start year of the player's active season */,
  "season_end" INTEGER /* End year of the player's active season */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player (e.g., healthy, injured, recovering) */,
  "contract_start" TEXT /* Start date of the player's current contract */,
  "contract_end" TEXT /* End date of the player's current contract */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player (e.g., right, left) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the current coach */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "primary_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team's uniform */,
  "secondary_color" TEXT /* Secondary color of the team's uniform */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date on which the match was played */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team competing in the match */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team competing in the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the match (e.g., Team1 Win, Team2 Win) */,
  "team1_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the first team */,
  "team2_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the second team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "assistant_referee1_name" TEXT /* Name of the first assistant referee */,
  "assistant_referee2_name" TEXT /* Name of the second assistant referee */,
  "fourth_official_name" TEXT /* Name of the fourth official */,
  "match_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the match in minutes */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the match went into overtime */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the match was decided by penalties */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season during which the match took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the season took place */,
  "number_of_rounds" INTEGER /* Total number of rounds in the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  "top_scorer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the top scorer in the season */,
  "top_assister_id" INTEGER /* ID of the top assister in the season */,
  "top_tackler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the top tackler in the season */,
  "top_kicker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the top kicker in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_top_assister_id FOREIGN KEY ("top_assister_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_top_kicker_id FOREIGN KEY ("top_kicker_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_top_scorer_id FOREIGN KEY ("top_scorer_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_top_tackler_id FOREIGN KEY ("top_tackler_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
